title: Luxxor
description: Luxxor is a performance-optimized, Hexxit-inspired adventure modpack packed with new biomes, dungeons, stronger combat, and useful QoL mods for smooth exploration and loot-focused survival.
body:
## Luxxor

**Luxxor** is a **NeoForge 1.21.1** adventure modpack inspired by classic Hexxit-style gameplay.  
It’s built for players who want **exploration, dungeon raiding, tough combat, and meaningful loot progression**—without a bloated mod list.

### What you get
- Massive exploration with **Biomes O’ Plenty**, **Regions Unexplored**, **Dynamic Trees**, and **Distant Horizons**
- Real adventure content: **Battle Towers**, **Dungeons and Taverns**, **YUNG’s Better Dungeons/Caves**, **Ruins**
- Strong gear/combat loop with **Hexxit Gear R**, **Big Swords R**, **Relics**, **Infernal Mobs**, and combat overhauls
- Useful QoL: **JEI**, **Jade**, **Waystones**, **Simple Backpacks**, **Storage Drawers**, **Corpse**
- Curated performance stack: **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **ModernFix**, **FerriteCore**, **Noisium**, **ServerCore**, and more

If you want a pack where you can pick a direction, find danger fast, and come back with better gear every run, **Luxxor** delivers.
